# `input.color`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.4

Build a color input descriptor.

## Signature

```ts
color(defaultValue: Color, opts?: {
    readonly title?: string;
}): ColorDescriptor {
    return Object.freeze({ kind: "color" as const, defaultValue, ...opts });
}
```

## Example

```ts
const c = input.color("#26a69a");
    void c;
```
